[F.No.Z-20018/4/2002-CPA)] RAJNEESHDUBE, Jt. Secy. Note:—The notification constituting the Loss of Ecology (Prevention and Payments of Compensation) Authority for the State of Tamil Nadu, was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Part lI—S.ECA 3(ii)] vide numbers S.0. 671(E), dated the 30th September, 1996 and subscquently amended vide notification numbers S.0. 710(E), dated the 12th October, 1996; S.0.
